underlying_goal: Finish and polish a Launchpad frontend feature branch, fix navigation/routing issues, and improve UI/UX design
friction_detail: Navigation links pointed to wrong/nonexistent routes, hydration mismatch occurred, and the overall UI was so poor the user demanded a full redesign with expert agents.
brief_summary: User wanted to finalize a Launchpad feature branch but hit routing bugs and hydration errors; after fixes, they were deeply unhappy with the UI quality and requested a full redesign before the session ended.
